Katagami — Art Styles that Look Alike

Katagami · Stage 2 · visual embeddings

Art styles that look alike

Text taste-vectors embed each style's description, so two styles that render almost identically but are worded differently read as unrelated. These pairs are ranked by how similar their rendered thumbnails are (SigLIP image cosine), each shown against the text cosine for the same pair.

156art styles embedded
5image pairs ≥ 0.90
36image pairs ≥ 0.85
34text-missed look-alikes

Visual duplicates the text vectors miss

Image cosine ≥ 0.85 but text cosine < 0.75 — they look like siblings, but their descriptions never say so. Δ is how much higher the image similarity is.

Image model: google/siglip2-base-patch16-224, run locally on each style's rendered thumbnail. Text model: Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 on the description. A future upgrade would use a paid multimodal embedder (Voyage / Cohere) for higher-fidelity visual matching.
